content.heroDescription_id: Belajar langsung dari seniman profesional Indonesia melalui kelas online interaktif, workshop intim, dan festival seni imersif. Selami warisan budaya lokal yang kaya dan kembangkan kreativitas kontemporer Anda.
content.heroDescription_en: Learn directly from professional Indonesian artists through interactive online classes, intimate workshops, and immersive art festivals. Dive into our rich local cultural heritage and develop your contemporary creativity.
content.aboutSubtitle_id: Gerbang Utama Anda Menuju Dunia Seniman
content.aboutSubtitle_en: Your Gateway to the World of Artists
content.aboutDescription_id:
Berseni lahir dari kesadaran sederhana bahwa banyak orang ingin lebih dekat dengan dunia seni rupa, tetapi bingung harus mulai dari mana. Akses ke seniman profesional seringkali terasa exclusif dan berjarak.

Kami memutuskan untuk membuka jalan itu. Di Berseni, Anda tidak hanya belajar teknik melukis dasar, tetapi juga berinteraksi langsung dengan seniman praktisi. Memahami proses kreatif, cerita, serta perjalanan karya mereka.

Kami percaya seni tidak hanya milik segelintir orang. Seni adalah ruang inklusif untuk semua orang belajar, tumbuh, dan terhubung satu sama lain.
content.aboutDescription_en:
Berseni was born from a simple realization that many people want to get closer to the visual art world, but are confused about where to start. Access to professional artists often feels exclusive and distant.

We decided to open that path. At Berseni, you do not only learn basic painting techniques, but also interact directly with practicing artists. Understand their creative processes, stories, and the journey of their works.

We believe art does not only belong to a select few. Art is an inclusive space for everyone to learn, grow, and connect with one another.
content.visiDescription_id: Menjadi jembatan global utama antara masyarakat umum and seniman lokal Indonesia, menumbuhkan ekosistem ekonomi seni yang berkelanjutan dan apresiasi seni yang bermakna.
content.visiDescription_en: To become the primary global bridge between the general public and local Indonesian artists, nurturing a sustainable art economy ecosystem and meaningful art appreciation.
misiList_id: Membuka akses langsung bagi publik untuk berinteraksi dan belajar dari seniman profesional.
Mendukung pemberdayaan ekonomi seniman lokal melalui eksposur, kolaborasi, dan apresiasi karya.
Membina komunitas pecinta seni yang inklusif, suportif, dan berkelanjutan di seluruh Indonesia.
misiList_en: Opening direct access for the public to interact and learn from professional artists.
Supporting the economic empowerment of local artists through exposure, collaboration, and work appreciation.
Nurturing an inclusive, supportive, and sustainable community of art lovers across Indonesia.
content.programsSubtitle_id: Tiga pilar utama Berseni dalam menghadirkan pengalaman eksplorasi seni rupa yang mendalam dan mudah diakses bagi siapa saja.
content.programsSubtitle_en: Three main pillars of Berseni in bringing a deep and accessible visual art experience for everyone.
content.prog1Desc_id: Hadiri kelas tatap muka intim, festival lukis tahunan, dan sesi "Meet Your Tutor" langsung di kota-kota Anda. Pengalaman praktek yang interaktif dan bersosialisasi.
content.prog1Desc_en: Attend intimate face-to-face classes, annual art festivals, and "Meet Your Tutor" sessions directly in your cities. Interactive hands-on experience and socializing.
content.prog2Desc_id: Akses ratusan materi video-on-demand eksklusif yang diajarkan oleh para pelukis andal Indonesia. Belajar secara bertahap, kapan saja, dan dari mana saja.
content.prog2Desc_en: Access hundreds of exclusive video-on-demand materials taught by skilled Indonesian painters. Learn step-by-step, anytime, and from anywhere.
content.prog3Desc_id: Miliki lukisan orisinal berkelas hasil kurasi seniman Nusantara serta perlengkapan melukis premium untuk melengkapi perjalanan kreativitas Anda.
content.prog3Desc_en: Own classy original paintings curated from Indonesian artists and premium painting supplies to complement your creative journey.
content.gallerySubtitle_id: Mulai langkah kreasi Anda. Pilih karya lukisan fisik orisinal untuk koleksi pribadi atau ikuti kelas melukis terpopuler kami.
content.gallerySubtitle_en: Start your creative journey. Select original physical paintings for personal collection or join our popular painting classes.
content.promoSubtitle_id: Miliki karya seni Nusantara bersertifikat resmi dengan harga diskon khusus.
content.promoSubtitle_en: Own official certified Nusantara art pieces with special discount prices.
content.testimonialsSubtitle_id: Cerita dan kesan jujur dari para pecinta seni, pemula, dan kolektor yang telah bergabung dalam komunitas Berseni.
content.testimonialsSubtitle_en: Honest reviews and impressions from art lovers, beginners, and collectors who have joined the Berseni community.
content.ctaSubtitle_id: Daftarkan diri Anda sebagai early supporter komunitas seni kami. Dapatkan penawaran eksklusif, rilis lukisan terbaru, dan undangan workshop terbatas langsung di email atau WhatsApp Anda.
content.ctaSubtitle_en: Register yourself as an early supporter of our art community. Get exclusive offers, latest painting releases, and limited workshop invitations directly in your email or WhatsApp.
content.aboutHeroTitle_en: Connecting Souls, Works, and Stories of
content.aboutHeroDesc_id: Kami adalah wadah kreatif yang berdedikasi untuk melestarikan warisan seni rupa Indonesia, memberdayakan seniman lokal, dan menghadirkan edukasi seni yang inklusif bagi semua orang.
content.aboutHeroDesc_en: We are a creative hub dedicated to preserving Indonesian art heritage, empowering local artists, and bringing inclusive art education to everyone.
content.aboutPillarsSubtitle_id: Nilai-nilai dasar yang memandu setiap langkah gerakan komunitas seni rupa Berseni.
content.aboutPillarsSubtitle_en: Basic values guiding every step of the Berseni art community movement.
content.aboutPillar1Desc_id: Kami meruntuhkan batasan eksklusivitas seni. Siapa pun, mulai dari anak-anak inklusif hingga dewasa amatir, berhak berkarya dan diapresiasi.
content.aboutPillar1Desc_en: We tear down the barriers of art exclusivity. Anyone, from inclusive children to amateur adults, has the right to create and be appreciated.
content.aboutPillar2Desc_id: Menjadi roda ekonomi yang menyokong kehidupan para seniman lokal Indonesia melalui komisi langsung, eksposur pameran, dan kurasi kelas.
content.aboutPillar2Desc_en: Becoming an economic wheel supporting the livelihood of local Indonesian artists through direct commissions, exhibition exposure, and class curation.
content.aboutPillar3Desc_id: Membawa warisan adiluhung Nusantara (seperti membatik tulis dan melukis lanskap klasik) ke dalam kemasan edukasi digital modern.
content.aboutPillar3Desc_en: Bringing the noble heritage of Nusantara (such as hand-drawn batik and classical landscape painting) into modern digital educational packaging.
content.aboutCommitmentTitle_id: Kami memastikan setiap karya & edukasi seni tersampaikan dengan hati.
content.aboutCommitmentTitle_en: We make sure every artwork & art education is delivered with heart.
content.aboutCommitmentDesc_id: Berseni melangkah lebih jauh dari sekadar platform transaksi. Kami merancang setiap kurikulum kelas melukis, memilih seniman pendamping, dan mengurasi lukisan orisinal secara cermat untuk memastikan nilai estetika dan cerita Nusantara tersalurkan secara utuh.
content.aboutCommitmentDesc_en: Berseni goes beyond a mere transaction platform. We carefully design every painting class curriculum, select mentor artists, and curate original paintings to ensure aesthetic values and stories of Nusantara are fully conveyed.
content.aboutCommit1Desc_id: Semua lukisan dan merchandise seni kami dilengkapi dengan sertifikat keaslian resmi (COA) langsung dari seniman.
content.aboutCommit1Desc_en: All our paintings and art merchandise are equipped with official certificate of authenticity (COA) directly from the artist.
content.aboutCommit2Desc_id: Kelas dirancang dan dipandu secara intensif oleh seniman profesional serta praktisi seni rupa berpengalaman.
content.aboutCommit2Desc_en: Classes are intensively designed and guided by professional artists and experienced visual art practitioners.
content.aboutCommit3Desc_id: Mendukung kelas sosial ramah difabel, anak-anak berkebutuhan khusus, serta pemula dewasa yang ingin memulai dari nol.
content.aboutCommit3Desc_en: Supporting difable-friendly social classes, special needs children, and adult beginners who want to start from scratch.
content.aboutQuote_id: "Seni adalah jembatan rasa yang menyatukan perbedaan, menghidupkan ruang, dan mengabadikan kisah Nusantara."
content.aboutQuote_en: "Art is a bridge of feelings that unites differences, enlivens spaces, and immortalizes stories of Nusantara."
content.aboutCtaDesc_id: Bergabunglah dengan kelas melukis maestro kami atau miliki lukisan klasik terkurasi langsung dari galeri kami.
content.aboutCtaDesc_en: Join our maestro painting classes or own curated classical paintings directly from our gallery.
content.collabHeroDesc_id: Mari jalin kemitraan kreatif bersama Berseni. Kami membuka peluang kolaborasi dengan brand, komunitas, dan partner venue untuk menghadirkan pengalaman seni rupa yang berkesan bagi semua orang.
content.collabHeroDesc_en: Let's build a creative partnership with Berseni. We open collaboration opportunities with brands, communities, and space partners to bring a memorable visual art experience for everyone.
content.collabBrandIntro_id: Berseni terbuka untuk berkolaborasi dengan brand, komunitas, dan perusahaan untuk menghadirkan pengalaman seni yang inspiratif dan berkesan. 🧡
content.collabBrandIntro_en: Berseni is open to collaborate with brands, communities, and companies to bring inspiring and memorable art experiences. 🧡
content.collabBrandFeat1Desc_id: Kolaborasi kreatif yang disesuaikan dengan nilai dan tujuan brandmu.
content.collabBrandFeat1Desc_en: Creative collaborations tailored to your brand values and goals.
content.collabBrandFeat2Desc_id: Berpengalaman dalam berbagai event & kampanye bersama berbagai partner.
content.collabBrandFeat2Desc_en: Experienced in various events & campaigns with various partners.
content.collabBrandFeat3Desc_id: Produk seni eksklusif, workshop, & aktivitas bermakna bagi audiens.
content.collabBrandFeat3Desc_en: Exclusive art products, workshops, & meaningful activities for audiences.
content.collabBrandFeat4Desc_id: Konten visual menarik untuk mendukung brand awareness produk Anda.
content.collabBrandFeat4Desc_en: Attractive visual content to support your product's brand awareness.
content.collabBrandCallout_id: "Mari ciptakan cerita, koneksi, dan karya yang berdampak bersama!"
content.collabBrandCallout_en: "Let's create stories, connections, and impactful works together!"
content.collabVenueSub_id: Kami sedang mencari venue yang ingin berkolaborasi dengan kami. Anda menyediakan tempat, kami bawa traffic & pengalaman seni!
content.collabVenueSub_en: We are looking for space partners that want to collaborate with us. You provide the venue, we bring the traffic & art experience!
content.collabVenueFeat1Desc_id: Dapatkan eksposur dan datangkan banyak pengunjung baru potensial ke lokasi Anda secara masif.
content.collabVenueFeat1Desc_en: Get exposure and bring many massive new potential visitors to your location.
content.collabVenueFeat2Desc_id: Kolaborasi kampanye media sosial dan pemasaran digital yang saling menguntungkan (*win-win*).
content.collabVenueFeat2Desc_en: Mutual (win-win) social media campaigns and digital marketing collaborations.
content.collabVenueFeat3Desc_id: Ciptakan aktivitas kreatif berkesan, pameran seni, atau workshop melukis yang hidup di lokasi Anda.
content.collabVenueFeat3Desc_en: Create memorable creative activities, art exhibitions, or live painting workshops at your location.
content.collabVenueCtaDesc_id: Punya cafe, resto, coworking space, atau hotel dengan area kosong yang berseni? Hubungi tim kami via WhatsApp sekarang juga untuk berdiskusi menjalin kerjasama yang seru ini!
content.collabVenueCtaDesc_en: Have a cafe, restaurant, coworking space, or hotel with an artistic empty area? Contact our team via WhatsApp right now to discuss this exciting collaboration!
content.emptyStoreDesc_id: Coba gunakan kata kunci pencarian lain atau pilih kategori yang berbeda.
content.emptyStoreDesc_en: Try using other search keywords or choose a different category.
content.blogHeaderDesc_id: Wawasan seputar teknik melukis, sejarah seni rupa, dan proses kreatif dari para seniman Indonesia.
content.blogHeaderDesc_en: Insights around painting techniques, visual art history, and the creative process of Indonesian artists.
content.blogEmpty_id: Belum ada artikel blog yang diterbitkan. Hubungi admin untuk menulis artikel baru.
content.blogEmpty_en: No blog articles published yet. Contact admin to write a new article.

activities.summary_id: Melukis lanskap alam bebas dipandu mentor profesional.
activities.summary_en: Painting open landscapes guided by professional mentors.
activities.description_id: Nikmati kesegaran udara pegunungan Ubud sembari mengekspresikan kreativitas Anda di atas kanvas. Dalam aktivitas ini, Anda akan diajarkan teknik menangkap cahaya alami, pencampuran warna cat akrilik, dan komposisi lanskap secara plein air (melukis di alam terbuka). Cocok untuk pemula maupun tingkat lanjut.
activities.description_en: Enjoy the fresh mountain air of Ubud while expressing your creativity on canvas. In this activity, you will be taught techniques of capturing natural light, blending acrylic colors, and plein air landscape composition. Perfect for beginners and advanced painters alike.
activities.details_id: Durasi: 3 Jam | Lokasi: Ubud, Bali | Termasuk: Kanvas, Cat, Kuas, & Snack
activities.details_en: Duration: 3 Hours | Location: Ubud, Bali | Includes: Canvas, Paint, Brushes, & Snacks

activities.summary_id: Galeri seni tahunan yang memajang karya kurasi terbaik komunitas.
activities.summary_en: An annual art gallery displaying the best curated works of the community.
activities.description_id: Berseni mewadahi para seniman lokal dan talenta baru dari komunitas kami untuk memamerkan karya mereka kepada publik dan kolektor. Pameran ini diadakan di galeri fisik dengan kurasi ketat dari kurator profesional, memberikan panggung apresiasi seni yang bermakna bagi semua orang.
activities.description_en: Berseni provides a platform for local artists and emerging talents from our community to exhibit their works to the public and collectors. This exhibition is held in a physical gallery with strict curation from professional curators, presenting a meaningful art appreciation stage for everyone.
activities.details_id: Durasi: 1 Minggu | Lokasi: Galeri Nasional, Jakarta | HTM: Gratis (Registrasi)
activities.details_en: Duration: 1 Week | Location: National Gallery, Jakarta | Ticket: Free (Registration)

activities.summary_id: Belajar membatik tulis klasik canting secara tradisional.
activities.summary_en: Learn traditional hand-drawn batik using canting and hot wax.
activities.description_id: Selami warisan luhur budaya nusantara dengan belajar membatik tulis tradisional menggunakan canting, lilin malam, dan pewarna alami. Dapatkan bimbingan intim langkah-demi-langkah mulai dari menggambar pola di kain primissima hingga proses pelorodan lilin.
activities.description_en: Dive into the rich heritage of Indonesian culture by learning traditional hand-drawn batik using a canting, wax, and natural dyes. Receive intimate, step-by-step guidance starting from tracing patterns on primissima cloth to the wax removal process.
activities.details_id: Durasi: 4 Jam | Lokasi: Studio Berseni, Bandung | Bawa pulang hasil batik sendiri
activities.details_en: Duration: 4 Hours | Location: Berseni Studio, Bandung | Take home your own batik artwork

activities.summary_id: Diskusi santai seputar seni rupa dibarengi sesi sketsa model.
activities.summary_en: Relaxed discussion around visual arts accompanied by a life model sketching session.
activities.description_id: Dapatkan wawasan mendalam mengenai industri kreatif dan proses berkarya langsung dari seniman profesional dalam sesi bincang-bincang santai. Acara kemudian dilanjutkan dengan sesi menggambar sketsa bersama model hidup (life drawing) menggunakan pensil charcoal.
activities.description_en: Gain deep insights into the creative industry and the process of creation directly from professional artists in a relaxed chat session. The event continues with a live figure sketching session using charcoal pencils.
activities.details_id: Durasi: 2.5 Jam | Lokasi: Berseni Hub, Yogyakarta | Alat gambar disediakan
activities.details_en: Duration: 2.5 Hours | Location: Berseni Hub, Yogyakarta | Drawing tools provided

activities.summary_id: Festival mewarnai dan melukis kanvas raksasa kolaboratif anak.
activities.summary_en: A children's collaborative giant 50-meter canvas painting and coloring festival.
activities.description_id: Ruang gembira dan bebas berekspresi untuk anak-anak (termasuk anak berkebutuhan khusus) untuk melukis bersama di atas gulungan kanvas raksasa sepanjang 50 meter. Aktivitas sosial ini bertujuan memicu kreativitas motorik anak dan mengenalkan seni rupa sejak dini.
activities.description_en: A joyful and expressive space for children (including children with special needs) to paint together on a giant 50-meter canvas roll. This social activity aims to stimulate children's motor creativity and introduce visual arts from an early age.
activities.details_id: Durasi: 1 Hari Penuh | Lokasi: Taman Kota Jakarta | Terbuka untuk umum
activities.details_en: Duration: Full Day | Location: Jakarta City Park | Open for public

content.blogAboutDesc_id: Berseni adalah platform kolaboratif dan komunitas seni rupa terbesar di Indonesia, menjembatani seniman lokal dan masyarakat umum untuk saling belajar, berkarya, dan mengapresiasi keindahan seni bersama-sama.
content.blogAboutDesc_en: Berseni is a collaborative platform and the largest visual art community in Indonesia, bridging local artists and the general public to learn, create, and appreciate the beauty of art together.

products.description_id: “It’s Okay Offline” mengajak kita untuk berhenti sejenak dari hiruk pikuk dunia digital dan kembali menikmati momen nyata di sekitar kita.
products.description_en: "It's Okay Offline" invites us to pause for a moment from the hustle and bustle of the digital world and return to enjoying the real moments around us.
products.specs_id: Cat Akrilik di atas Kanvas, Stretcher Frame, 75 x 55 cm, 100% Buatan Tangan Orisinal, Termasuk Sertifikat Keaslian (COA)
products.specs_en: Acrylic on Canvas, Stretcher Frame, 75 x 55 cm, 100% Original Handmade, Certificate of Authenticity (COA) Included

products.description_id: “Diving Mind” menggambarkan perjalanan menyelami pikiran dan emosi di tengah dunia yang penuh distraksi dan tekanan.
products.description_en: "Diving Mind" depicts the journey of diving into thoughts and emotions amidst a world full of distractions and pressure.
products.specs_id: Cat Akrilik di atas Kanvas, Stretcher Frame, 60 x 50 cm, 100% Buatan Tangan Orisinal, Termasuk Sertifikat Keaslian (COA)
products.specs_en: Acrylic on Canvas, Stretcher Frame, 60 x 50 cm, 100% Original Handmade, Certificate of Authenticity (COA) Included

products.description_id: “Noise of Innocence” menggambarkan semangat polos dan kebahagiaan sederhana yang tetap bersinar di tengah dunia yang ramai dan penuh tekanan.
products.description_en: "Noise of Innocence" depicts the pure spirit and simple happiness that keep shining in the middle of a busy and high-pressure world.
products.specs_id: Cat Akrilik di atas Papan Potong (Perkiraan), Siap dipajang, 17 x 29 cm, 100% Buatan Tangan Orisinal, Termasuk Sertifikat Keaslian (COA)
products.specs_en: Acrylic on Cutting Board (Approx.), Ready to display, 17 x 29 cm, 100% Original Handmade, Certificate of Authenticity (COA) Included

products.title_id: Original Artwork - "Laughing at the End of the World"
products.title_en: Original Artwork - "Laughing at the End of the World"
products.description_id: “Laughing at the End of the World” menggambarkan keberanian untuk tetap tersenyum dan menikmati hidup meski dunia terasa penuh tekanan.
products.description_en: "Laughing at the End of the World" depicts the courage to keep smiling and enjoying life even when the world feels full of pressure.
products.specs_id: Cat Akrilik di atas Papan Potong (Perkiraan), Siap dipajang, 17 x 29 cm, 100% Buatan Tangan Orisinal, Termasuk Sertifikat Keaslian (COA)
products.specs_en: Acrylic on Cutting Board (Approx.), Ready to display, 17 x 29 cm, 100% Original Handmade, Certificate of Authenticity (COA) Included

products.title_id: Meowna Lisa - Workshop Melukis Cat Akrilik
products.description_id:
Belajar melukis kucing kesayangan Anda dengan gaya ikonik Mona Lisa ('Meowna Lisa') menggunakan cat akrilik. Workshop offline interaktif ini cocok untuk pemula maupun tingkat lanjut, dipandu langsung oleh instruktur berpengalaman di Seven Sumatra Beans, Jakarta Barat.

Tanggal: 28 Juni 2026
Waktu: 13.00 - 16.00 WIB
Lokasi: Seven Sumatra Beans, Tanjung Duren, Jakarta Barat

Investasi Early Bird hanya berlaku sampai 10 Juni 2026.
products.description_en:
Learn to paint your beloved cat in the iconic style of Mona Lisa ('Meowna Lisa') using acrylic paint. This interactive offline workshop is suitable for beginners to advanced levels, guided directly by experienced instructors at Seven Sumatra Beans, West Jakarta.

Date: June 28, 2026
Time: 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM WIB
Location: Seven Sumatra Beans, Tanjung Duren, West Jakarta

Early Bird investment is only valid until June 10, 2026.
products.specs_id: Kanvas 30x40 cm (bisa dibawa pulang), Alat & Bahan Lukis Disediakan, Free Minuman & Makanan Ringan
products.specs_en: Canvas 30x40 cm (can be taken home), Painting Tools & Materials Provided, Free Drinks & Light Snacks

products.title_id: Basic Oil Realism Painting dengan Sriyadi "Srinthil" (Kelas Online)
products.title_en: Basic Oil Realism Painting with Sriyadi "Srinthil" (Online Class)
products.description_id:
Kelas online melukis cat minyak dari nol yang dibimbing langsung oleh seniman Sriyadi "Srinthil". Pahami bentuk, cahaya, dan volume agar lukisan Anda terasa hidup dan berdimensi. Cocok untuk pemula tanpa pengalaman sebelumnya.

Bab Materi:
- Bab 1: Mengenal Sriyadi "Srinthil"
- Bab 2: Persiapan dan Bahan
- Bab 3: Sketsa dan Teori Bayangan
- Bab 4: Pewarnaan
- Bab 5: Detail Objek
- Bab 6: Pewarnaan Background
- Bab 7: Finishing Background
- Bab 8: Kirim Karya Seni Anda
- Bab 9: Sesi Gabung Komunitas & Sharing
- Bab 10: Unduh E-sertifikat Anda
products.description_en:
An online oil painting class from scratch guided directly by artist Sriyadi "Srinthil". Understand shapes, light, and volume so your paintings feel alive and dimensional. Suitable for beginners with no prior experience.

Course Chapters:
- Chapter 1: Getting to Know Sriyadi "Srinthil"
- Chapter 2: Preparation and Materials
- Chapter 3: Sketching and Shadow Theory
- Chapter 4: Coloring
- Chapter 5: Object Detailing
- Chapter 6: Background Coloring
- Chapter 7: Finishing Background
- Chapter 8: Submit Your Art Work
- Chapter 9: Join Community & Sharing Session
- Chapter 10: Download Your E-certificate
products.specs_id: Akses Video Selamanya (10 Bab), Bimbingan & Arahan Seniman, Grup Komunitas Belajar, E-Sertifikat Kelulusan
products.specs_en: Lifetime Video Access (10 Chapters), Artist Guidance & Direction, Learning Community Group, E-Certificate of Graduation

Date: June 28, 2026

products.title_id: Summer in Pink - Workshop Melukis Cat Akrilik
products.title_en: Summer in Pink - Acrylic Painting Workshop
products.description_id:
Lukis keindahan musim panas dengan nuansa warna merah muda yang lembut, hembusan angin laut, dan momen yang damai di Yello Hotel Manggarai, Jakarta Pusat. Ciptakan mahakarya musim panas Anda sendiri dalam suasana yang menyenangkan!

Tanggal: 12 Juli 2026
Waktu: 13.00 - 16.00 WIB
Lokasi: Yello Hotel Manggarai, Jakarta Pusat

Investasi Early Bird hanya berlaku sampai 7 Juli 2026.
products.description_en:
Paint the beauty of summer with soft pink color tones, ocean breeze, and peaceful moments at Yello Hotel Manggarai, Central Jakarta. Create your own summer masterpiece in a fun atmosphere!

Date: July 12, 2026
Time: 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM WIB
Location: Yello Hotel Manggarai, Central Jakarta

Early Bird investment is only valid until July 7, 2026.

products.title_id: Tweet your Heart - Workshop Melukis Cat Akrilik
products.title_en: Tweet your Heart - Acrylic Painting Workshop
products.description_id:
Lukis sepasang burung cinta (love bird) yang penuh warna dan bawa pulang karya agung yang penuh cinta serta energi positif di The Veranda Resort Residence, Jakarta Selatan. Dipandu langkah demi langkah oleh seniman profesional.

Tanggal: 5 Juli 2026
Waktu: 15.00 - 18.00 WIB
Lokasi: The Veranda Resort Residence, Jakarta Selatan

Investasi Early Bird hanya berlaku sampai 2 Juli 2026.
products.description_en:
Paint a colorful pair of love birds and bring home a masterpiece full of love and positive energy at The Veranda Resort Residence, South Jakarta. Guided step-by-step by professional artists.

posts.excerpt_id: Ringkasan mengenai perkembangan seni lukis modern di Indonesia.
posts.excerpt_en: Summary of the development of modern painting art in Indonesia.
posts.content_id: Seni lukis modern di Indonesia berkembang sangat pesat dengan pengaruh berbagai aliran.
posts.content_en: Modern painting in Indonesia is growing very rapidly with the influence of various genres.

posts.excerpt_id: Melukis adalah salah satu hobi yang memiliki banyak manfaat. Selain menjadi media untuk mengekspresikan ide, melukis juga dapat menghasilkan ekonomi...
posts.excerpt_en: Painting is one of the hobbies that has many benefits. In addition to being a medium to express ideas, painting can also generate economic value...
posts.content_id:
Melukis adalah salah satu hobi yang memiliki banyak manfaat. Selain menjadi media untuk mengekspresikan ide, melukis juga dapat membantu mengurangi stres, meningkatkan konsentrasi, serta mengasah kepekaan estetika.

Lebih dari sekadar hobi, melukis kini juga dapat menjadi aktivitas yang menghasilkan secara ekonomi. Banyak seniman mandiri yang memulai karir mereka dari hobi melukis di rumah hingga akhirnya memamerkan karya mereka di galeri nasional dan internasional.
posts.content_en:
Painting is a hobby with numerous benefits. Apart from being a medium to express ideas, painting can help reduce stress, improve concentration, and sharpen aesthetic sensitivity.

More than just a hobby, painting has now also become an economically productive activity. Many independent artists started their careers from home painting hobbies before eventually exhibiting their works in national and international galleries.

posts.excerpt_id: Melalui banyak medium seperti film atau bahkan kisah-kisah romansa, pelukis tampak sebagai sosok yang mendokumentasikan masa lalu...
posts.excerpt_en: Through many mediums such as films or even romance stories, painters appear as figures documenting the past...
posts.content_id:
Melalui banyak medium seperti film atau bahkan kisah-kisah romansa, pelukis tampak sebagai sosok yang berdiam diri di studio untuk menghasilkan karya estetik.

Namun sejarah mencatat bahwa lukisan memiliki peran yang jauh lebih besar daripada sekadar hiasan dinding. Sebelum fotografi ditemukan, lukisan adalah media dokumentasi visual utama yang merekam peristiwa penting, adat istiadat, dan kondisi sosial masyarakat di masa lampau.
posts.content_en:
Through many mediums like movies or romance stories, painters are often depicted as figures quietly working in their studios to produce aesthetic pieces.

However, history records that paintings have a much grander role than mere wall decorations. Before photography was invented, paintings were the primary visual documentation medium recording key events, traditions, and the social conditions of historical societies.

posts.title_id: Menemukan Kedamaian Lewat Seni Lukis Ekspresif
posts.excerpt_id: Melukis bukan hanya memindahkan bentuk ke kanvas. Ia adalah proses meditasi visual untuk melepaskan beban pikiran dan menemukan ketenangan jiwa...
posts.excerpt_en: Painting is not just transferring shapes to canvas. It is a visual meditation process to release mental burdens and find peace of mind...
posts.content_id:
Di dunia yang serba cepat, kecemasan sering kali menumpuk. Terapi seni (*art therapy*), khususnya melukis ekspresif, terbukti mampu menurunkan kadar kortisol dan membantu meredakan stres.

Melukis ekspresif membebaskan Anda mengekspresikan emosi mentah tanpa tuntutan kemiripan bentuk fisik. Sapuan kuas yang bebas dan pemilihan warna yang intuitif membantu merilis ketegangan mental.
posts.content_en:
In a fast-paced world, anxiety often accumulates. Art therapy, specifically expressive painting, has been proven to lower cortisol levels and help alleviate stress.

Expressive painting frees you to express raw emotions without demanding physical representation. Free brushstrokes and intuitive color choices help release mental tension.

posts.title_id: Pentingnya Memilih Kuas dan Jenis Cat bagi Pemula
posts.title_en: The Importance of Choosing Brushes and Paint Types for Beginners
posts.excerpt_id: Bagi pemula, melangkah ke toko alat tulis seni bisa terasa mengintimidasi. Simak panduan praktis memilih jenis kuas dan cat yang tepat untuk memulai hobi baru...
posts.excerpt_en: For a beginner, stepping into an art supply store can feel intimidating. Read our practical guide to choosing the right brushes and paint types to start your new hobby...
posts.content_id:
Memulai hobi melukis sering kali diawali dengan kebingungan memilih peralatan. Apakah harus memakai cat air, akrilik, atau cat minyak?

Untuk pemula, cat akrilik sangat direkomendasikan karena cepat kering, mudah diencerkan dengan air, dan memiliki warna yang pekat. Kuas jenis flat dan bulat ukuran medium juga menjadi bekal yang cukup untuk memulai goresan pertama Anda di atas kanvas.
posts.content_en:
Starting a painting hobby often begins with confusion over equipment selection. Should you use watercolor, acrylic, or oil paint?

For beginners, acrylic paint is highly recommended because it dries quickly, is easily diluted with water, and has high color opacity. Flat and round brush types in medium sizes are a sufficient kit to start your first strokes on canvas.

home.title_id: Berseni - Galeri Seni & Kelas Melukis Online
home.title_en: Berseni - A World of Art For Everyone
home.description_id: Platform penghubung publik dan seniman Indonesia. Temukan kelas melukis online, workshop offline, dan karya seni terbaik langsung dari para maestro.
home.description_en: A platform connecting the public and Indonesian artists. Discover online painting classes, offline workshops, and the best artwork directly from the maestros.
home.keywords_id: seni, lukis, kelas online, workshop offline, lukisan indonesia, belajar melukis, berseni, shopee, lynk.id
home.keywords_en: art, painting, online classes, offline workshops, indonesian painting, learn painting, berseni, shopee, lynk.id
home.geo_facts_id: Berseni (Berseni.id) didirikan pada tahun 2026 sebagai platform penghubung komunitas seni rupa terbesar di Indonesia, menawarkan kelas melukis online (e-course) oleh maestro Sriyadi 'Srinthil', workshop melukis akrilik tatap muka (Meowna Lisa, Paw-casso, Summer in Pink, Tweet your Heart), dan galeri lukisan orisinal bersertifikat resmi (COA).
home.geo_facts_en: Berseni (Berseni.id) was founded in 2026 as the largest collaborative art platform and community in Indonesia, offering online painting classes (e-courses) by maestro Sriyadi 'Srinthil', offline painting workshops (Meowna Lisa, Paw-casso, Summer in Pink, Tweet your Heart), and certified original artworks (COA).
home.geo_faq_q1_id: Apa saja program utama yang ditawarkan oleh Berseni?
home.geo_faq_q1_en: What are the main programs offered by Berseni?
home.geo_faq_a1_id: Berseni memiliki tiga pilar utama: workshop melukis offline di berbagai kota, kelas online video-on-demand interaktif bersama seniman profesional, serta penjualan lukisan fisik orisinal bersertifikat (COA).
home.geo_faq_a1_en: Berseni has three main pillars: offline hands-on painting workshops in various cities, interactive online video-on-demand classes with professional artists, and certified original physical paintings (COA).

about.description_id: Temukan kisah kami, visi misi, dan komitmen Berseni dalam menjadi jembatan global utama antara masyarakat umum dan seniman lokal Indonesia.
about.description_en: Discover our story, vision, mission, and commitment in becoming the primary global bridge between the general public and local Indonesian artists.
about.keywords_id: tentang kami, berseni, visi misi, komunitas seni, indonesia, melukis
about.keywords_en: about us, berseni, vision mission, art community, indonesia, painting
about.geo_facts_id: Berseni dibangun di atas visi menjadi jembatan global utama antara masyarakat umum dan seniman lokal Indonesia. Memiliki misi membuka akses belajar seni, mendukung ekonomi seniman lokal melalui pameran, dan membina komunitas seni rupa inklusif.
about.geo_facts_en: Berseni is built upon the vision of becoming the primary global bridge between the general public and local Indonesian artists. Its mission includes opening art education access, supporting local artists' economy through exhibitions, and nurturing an inclusive art community.
about.geo_faq_q1_id: Kapan dan di mana Berseni didirikan?
about.geo_faq_q1_en: When and where was Berseni founded?
about.geo_faq_a1_id: Berseni didirikan pada tahun 2026 dengan studio pusat di Ubud, Bali dan kantor operasional di Tanjung Duren, Jakarta Barat, melayani ribuan murid seni di seluruh Indonesia.
about.geo_faq_a1_en: Berseni was founded in 2026 with its main creative studio in Ubud, Bali and operational office in Tanjung Duren, West Jakarta, serving thousands of art students across Indonesia.

collaboration.description_id: Buka peluang kolaborasi kreatif bersama Berseni. Kami terbuka untuk brand, komunitas, dan partner venue untuk menghadirkan pengalaman seni terbaik.
collaboration.description_en: Open creative collaboration opportunities with Berseni. We are open for brands, communities, and venue partners to bring the best art experiences.
collaboration.keywords_id: kolaborasi, kerjasama, venue partner, brand collaboration, berseni, event seni
collaboration.keywords_en: collaboration, partnership, venue partner, brand collaboration, berseni, art event
collaboration.geo_facts_id: Berseni membuka kemitraan kolaboratif dalam dua bentuk: Brand Collaboration (kolaborasi event kreatif korporasi, aktivasi brand, pembuatan produk merchandise seni eksklusif) dan Host/Space Venue Collaboration (restoran, cafe, hotel, coworking space sebagai tempat workshop).
collaboration.geo_facts_en: Berseni opens collaborative partnerships in two forms: Brand Collaboration (corporate creative events, brand activations, exclusive art merchandise products) and Host/Space Venue Collaboration (restaurants, cafes, hotels, coworking spaces hosting workshops).
collaboration.geo_faq_q1_id: Jenis kolaborasi apa saja yang ditawarkan oleh Berseni untuk korporat?
collaboration.geo_faq_q1_en: What kinds of corporate collaborations does Berseni offer?
collaboration.geo_faq_a1_id: Kami menyediakan event workshop seni korporat eksklusif, aktivasi brand interaktif, pembuatan visual konten estetik, serta merchandise seni khusus berlogo brand Anda.
collaboration.geo_faq_a1_en: We provide exclusive corporate art workshops, interactive brand activations, aesthetic visual content creation, and custom art merchandise displaying your brand logo.

store.title_id: Galeri & Kelas Seni - Berseni Art Market
store.title_en: Gallery & Art Classes - Berseni Art Market
store.description_id: Jelajahi seluruh koleksi karya seni orisinal Indonesia, kelas melukis online (e-course), dan pendaftaran intimate workshop offline dari Berseni.
store.description_en: Explore the entire collection of original Indonesian artworks, online painting classes (e-courses), and offline intimate workshop registrations from Berseni.
store.keywords_id: marketplace seni, karya seni, lukisan, kelas online, workshop offline, belajar melukis, berseni, indonesia
store.keywords_en: art marketplace, artwork, painting, online class, offline workshop, learn painting, berseni, indonesia
store.geo_facts_id: Art Market Berseni menjual lukisan fisik orisinal (seperti 'It's OK Offline', 'Diving Mind', 'Noise of Innocence', 'Laughing at the End of the World') bersertifikat keaslian COA resmi serta pendaftaran e-course kelas online (Basic Oil Realism oleh Sriyadi Srinthil) dan tiket workshop offline.
store.geo_facts_en: Berseni Art Market sells original physical paintings (such as 'It's OK Offline', 'Diving Mind', 'Noise of Innocence', 'Laughing at the End of the World') with official Certificate of Authenticity (COA), online e-course registrations (Basic Oil Realism by Sriyadi Srinthil), and offline workshop tickets.
store.geo_faq_q1_id: Apakah lukisan fisik yang dibeli di Berseni dikirim dengan aman?
store.geo_faq_q1_en: Are physical paintings purchased from Berseni shipped safely?
store.geo_faq_a1_id: Setiap lukisan dikemas menggunakan busa tebal pelindung dan peti kayu kokoh untuk mencegah kerusakan, serta didukung asuransi pengiriman penuh.
store.geo_faq_a1_en: Each painting is packed with thick protective foam and a sturdy wooden crate to prevent damage, backed by full transit insurance.

blog.description_id: Wawasan seputar teknik melukis, sejarah seni rupa, dan proses kreatif dari para seniman Indonesia.
blog.description_en: Insights around painting techniques, art history, and creative processes of Indonesian artists.
blog.keywords_id: blog seni, teknik melukis, sejarah seni, proses kreatif, seniman indonesia, cat air, akrilik
blog.keywords_en: art blog, painting techniques, art history, creative process, indonesian artists, watercolor, acrylic
blog.geo_facts_id: Blog Berseni menerbitkan artikel wawasan mendalam seputar sejarah seni rupa Indonesia, panduan memilih kuas dan cat akrilik untuk pemula, terapi seni melukis ekspresif untuk kedamaian jiwa, dan perkembangan seni lukis modern kontemporer.
blog.geo_facts_en: Berseni Blog publishes deep insight articles about Indonesian art history, practical guides on choosing brushes and acrylic paint for beginners, expressive painting art therapy for peace of mind, and modern contemporary painting developments.
blog.geo_faq_q1_id: Siapa saja yang menulis artikel di Blog Berseni?
blog.geo_faq_q1_en: Who writes the articles on the Berseni Blog?
blog.geo_faq_a1_id: Artikel ditulis oleh tim kurator internal Berseni, seniman mitra kontributor, serta praktisi sejarah seni rupa Indonesia untuk menjaga kualitas wawasan.
blog.geo_faq_a1_en: Articles are written by Berseni's internal curatorial team, contributing partner artists, and Indonesian art history practitioners to maintain insight quality.
